title: S + V + as well as / in addition to + N/V-ing

formulas.formula: S + V + as well as + N/V-ing
formulas.zh: 主詞＋動詞＋as well as（除……之外還）＋名詞/動名詞

formulas.formula: S + V + in addition to + N/V-ing
formulas.zh: 主詞＋動詞＋in addition to（除……之外還）＋名詞/動名詞

explanation: as well as 與 in addition to 均表「除……之外還有」的附加關係。重點是動詞與主要主詞一致，不受後接的名詞或動名詞影響。as well as 用於正式與非正式場合；in addition to 較正式，後接名詞或動名詞形式。兩者都用來補充說明主詞的額外行為或屬性。需注意主動詞時態要與主要主詞相符，不因後接詞彙而改變。

examples.eng: She speaks English as well as French fluently.
examples.chi: 她不但說英文流利，法文也說得流利。

examples.eng: The director in addition to the actors attended the premiere event.
examples.chi: 除了演員之外，導演也參加了首映式。

examples.eng: Playing the piano as well as composing music is his passion.
examples.chi: 彈鋼琴和作曲都是他的熱情所在。

examples.eng: The company will expand sales in addition to improving product quality.
examples.chi: 除了改善產品品質外，公司還將擴大銷售。

extension.tip: 動詞單複數由主要主詞決定，不因 as well as/in addition to 後的詞彙而改變。in addition to 後須接名詞或 V-ing 形式，不接原形動詞。注意主要主詞若為單數，動詞必須單數；若為複數，動詞必須複數。

examples.test: The teacher as well as the students (is/are) happy.
examples.result: → 正確：is（以 teacher 為主）；錯誤：are（忽視主要主詞）

examples.test: He enjoys reading in addition to (write/writing) novels.
examples.result: → 正確：writing（in addition to 後接 V-ing）；錯誤：write（違反語法）

examples.test: She speaks French as well as English (good/well).
examples.result: → 正確：well（修飾動詞 speaks，用副詞）；錯誤：good（應為副詞）

extension.note: 記住：主要主詞決定動詞，後接詞只是補充；in addition to 後一定是名詞或 V-ing。

parts: the staff enjoys the new office environment.
exercises.sentence: The manager as well as the staff enjoys the new office environment.
exercises.translation: 經理和全體職員都喜歡新辦公室環境。

exercises.sentence: In addition to attending classes, students must complete homework assignments.
exercises.translation: 除了上課之外，學生還必須完成家庭作業。

exercises.sentence: The athlete practices basketball as well as swimming every day.
exercises.translation: 這位運動員每天既練籃球也練游泳。

parts: In addition to improving customer service, the company will
exercises.sentence: In addition to improving customer service, the company will expand its product line.
exercises.translation: 除了改善客服之外，公司還將擴大產品線。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的附加關係表達方式，使句子完整且語法正確。
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。'as well as' 表示「除……之外還有」，用於列舉相同或相似的事物。Maria 說西班牙語和葡萄牙語都很流利。B 項 'as good as' 表示「幾乎與……一樣好」，用法不同。C 項 'also as' 不是正確搭配。D 項 'and well as' 為文法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷句子主動詞時態應如何搭配，不受後接名詞影響。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The manager as well as the employees _______ attending the conference tomorrow.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 D。雖然後面有 'employees'（複數），但 'as well as' 不影響主詞的單數性質，主詞仍為單數 'manager'。加上句子提及 'tomorrow'，應用未來時 'will be'。A 項 'is' 時態錯誤，B 項忽視主詞為單數，C 項時態不符句意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的介系詞短語並注意動詞形式與主詞搭配。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The professor, in addition to _______ the research project, _______ supervising ten graduate students.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。'in addition to' 後接動名詞 'leading'，主詞為單數 'professor'，所以動詞應用 'is'。A 項動詞用複數形錯誤。C 項 'lead' 前應為動名詞。D 項動詞用複數也錯誤。注意主詞-動詞一致性不受 'in addition to' 後名詞影響。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型，需判斷完整的時態搭配和並列結構正確性。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only the CEO but also the board members, _______ their personal interests, _______ committed to improving the company's sustainability initiatives.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。主要主詞由 'not only...but also' 連接，結構上複數主詞應配複數動詞 'are'。'in addition to' 可正確引入補充資訊 'their personal interests'。B 項動詞誤用單數。C 項 'is' 與複數主詞不符。D 項 'as well as having' 結構冗長不合所需。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 除了學習數學，我還學習英文。
translation_exercises.answer: I study English as well as mathematics.
key_points: as well as 連接兩個並列的名詞
主詞 I 與動詞 study 須一致
as well as 後接名詞形式
hints: 句型框架：S + V + as well as + N（主詞 + 動詞 + as well as + 名詞）
注意：as well as 後不改變主要動詞的時態，動詞仍與主詞 I 一致（study 而非 studies）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 除了參加社團活動，Tom 還參加了學校運動會。
translation_exercises.answer: Tom participated in the school sports meet as well as joining club activities.
key_points: as well as 後可接動名詞 joining
主要動詞 participated 與主詞 Tom 一致
hints: 句型框架：S + V (過去式) + as well as + V-ing（主詞 + 過去動詞 + as well as + 動名詞）
注意：as well as 後的動名詞 joining 不影響主要動詞時態，主要動詞時態仍由主詞決定

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 除了完成功課，學生們還需要準備期末考試。
translation_exercises.answer: Students need to prepare for the final exam in addition to completing their homework.
key_points: in addition to 較正式，後接動名詞 completing
主詞 Students 與動詞 need 保持一致
不定詞 to prepare 與 in addition to completing 並列
hints: 句型框架：S + V + in addition to + V-ing（主詞 + 動詞 + in addition to + 動名詞）
注意：in addition to 後必須接動名詞或名詞，不能接不定詞；主要動詞 need 與複數主詞 Students 一致

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 除了發展自己的興趣愛好，應屆畢業生還需要思考未來的職涯規劃。
translation_exercises.answer: High school graduates need to think about their future career planning in addition to developing their personal interests and hobbies.
key_points: in addition to 後接複合動名詞片語 developing their personal interests and hobbies
主詞 graduates 與動詞 need 保持一致
不定詞 to think about 與 in addition to 動名詞結構並列
hints: 句型框架：S + V + in addition to + V-ing...（主詞 + 動詞 + in addition to + 複雜動名詞片語）
注意：in addition to 後的動名詞片語可包含受詞和修飾詞；主要動詞 need 與主詞 graduates 保持現在式一致，不因後接的複雜結構而改變
